headline: Oil Stocks Look Poised for Another Leg Higher
summary: Peace talks between the US and Iran have again collapsed and oil stocks look ready to rally again. Marathon Petroleum, Valero Energy and Phillips 66 all boast top Zacks Ranks and strong price momentum.

headline: Is Marathon Petroleum (MPC) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Marathon Petroleum (MPC) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: Petrobras Cuts Diesel Prices by 9.6% Under Govt Subsidy Program
summary: PBR cuts diesel prices by 9.6% to 3.3 reais per liter under a federal subsidy plan that offsets fuel taxes and eases domestic costs.
